name: Fast Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar and 1/2 cup water in a saucepan.
2. Boil over high heat until the mixture reaches exactly one minute of boiling time.
3. Remove from heat, add optional cocoa, and stir.
4. Pour the mixture over peanut butter and vanilla extract in a bowl.
5. Beat until thick.
6. Pour into a greased pan and allow to cool.
7. Cut into squares.
This recipe starts out as peanut-butter fudge, but with the addition of powdered cocoa, can be made into chocolate fudge. The basic peanut butter version is highly recommended due to its simplicity and deliciousness.
